title: BOCELLI 1831 Prosecco DOC Spumante Extra Dry - Italian Sparkling White Wine - 100% Glera Grapes, Italy - 75cl / 750ml, 11% ABV
features: A PASSION FOR WINE: In Lajatico, Tuscany, the Bocelli family shared a significant piece of their familial history and presented one of their great passions - wine, creating an outstanding ‘Made In Italy’ recognized throughout the world

VINIFICATION: The must, obtained by soft pressing of Glera grape, undergoes an initial fermentation at 10°C; the base wine is then transferred into pressurized stainless-steel tanks, where it is made sparkling using the traditional Charmat method
CELEBRATE IN STYLE: Smooth and irresistibly effervescent—turns every occasion into a moment worth remembering.
COLOUR: Bright pale straw-yellow; a fine, clear mousse with a very delicate perlage

THE BOUQUET & TASTE: Very fruity and aromatic, it is attractively intense with hints of wisteria flowers and Rennet apples on the nose; the palate is well-balanced and appealing, with the extremely delicate almond note that is typical of Glera
description: Product Description Bocelli Prosecco DOC Spumante Extra Dry 75cl Italian Sparkling White Wine 100% Glera grapes Lightly bubbled Prosecco with notes of white flowers and Rennet apples on the nose with delicate fruity tones on the palate. Excellent acidity and well-balanced. The freshly harvested Glera grapes are transferred to the wine making cellar for a soft and delicate pressing. The must is clarified and kept at 0° throughout the year. The fermentation takes place in stainless steel autoclaves applying the Martinotti-Charmat method with the aid of selected yeasts. Ingredients 100% Glera Grapes - Potassium metabisulphite – Carboxymethylcellulose –-sucrose Manufacturer Contact Information CASA VINICOLA ZONIN S.P.A. GAMBELLARA See more
